global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender body and a prominent crest on its head. It has olive-green upperparts and a bright yellow belly. The wings and tail are brownish with rufous edges, and the throat is pale gray. The beak is broad and slightly hooked.

part_details.head: Slender with a prominent crest, olive-green with a pale gray throat.
part_details.body: Medium-sized, slender, olive-green upperparts, bright yellow belly.
part_details.wings: Brownish with rufous edges, medium length.
part_details.tail: Brownish with rufous edges, slightly forked.
part_details.beak: Broad, slightly hooked, dark in color.

spatial_relations: The crest is positioned on top of the head.
The wings extend from the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
